polar and equatorial radii for Neptune's 1-bar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
these models assume the voyager wind profile from Tollefson et al. (2018, Icarus 311).
the distribution of models in this file comes from randomly drawing the occultation radius from a Gaussian with standard deviation equal to 5 km.
